candidates.name: A1
candidates.instructions: Pour all ingredients into a cocktail shaker, mix and serve over ice into a chilled glass.

candidates.name: AT&T
candidates.instructions: Pour Vodka and Gin over ice, add Tonic and Stir

candidates.name: Adam
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: A. J.
candidates.instructions: Shake ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Affair
candidates.instructions: Pour schnapps, orange juice, and cranberry juice over ice in a highball glass. Top with club soda and serve.

candidates.name: Avalon
candidates.instructions: Fill a tall glass with ice. Layer the Finlandia Vodka, lemon and apple juices, Pisang Ambon, and top up with lemonade. Stir slightly and garnish with a spiralled cucumber skin and a red cherry. The cucumber provides zest and looks attractive. This drink, created by Timo Haimi, took first prize in the 1991 Finlandia Vodka Long Drink Competition.

candidates.name: Almeria
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Abilene
candidates.instructions: Pour all of the ingredients into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.

candidates.name: Applecar
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Artillery
candidates.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Addington
candidates.instructions: Mix both the vermouth's in a shaker and strain into a cold glass. Top up with a squirt of Soda Water.

candidates.name: Bellini
candidates.instructions: Pour peach purée into chilled flute, add sparkling wine. Stir gently.

candidates.name: Balmoral
candidates.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Bluebird
candidates.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with crushed ice, combine the gin, triple sec, Curacao, and bitters. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass and garnish with the lemon twist and the cherry.

candidates.name: Boomerang
candidates.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, vermouth, bitters, and maraschino liqueur. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass and garnish with the cherry.

candidates.name: Brigadier
candidates.instructions: Mix ingredients in a warmed mug and stir.

candidates.name: Broadside
candidates.instructions: Half fill the glass with ice cubes. Crush the wormwood and add to ice. Pour rum, scotch and butters, then serve!

candidates.name: Blackthorn
candidates.instructions: Stir sloe gin and vermouth with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Add the twist of lemon peel and serve.

candidates.name: Bible Belt
candidates.instructions: Mix all ingredients, and pour over ice.

candidates.name: Baby Eskimo
candidates.instructions: Leave ice-cream out for about 10 minutes. Add ingredients in order, stir with chopstick (butter knife or spoon works too). Consume immediately and often. Nice and light, great for following a heavy drink.

candidates.name: Bahama Mama
candidates.instructions:
Add 2 parts club soda or more or less to taste.

Mix it all together and pour over a bunch of ice. Drink with a straw.

candidates.name: Cream Soda
candidates.instructions: Pour 1oz of Spiced Rum into a highball glass with ice. Fill with Ginger Ale.

candidates.name: Cuba Libra
candidates.instructions: Fill tall glass with ice cubes. Add rum. Rub cut edge of lime on rim of glass then squeeze juice into glass. Fill with Coca-Cola. Garnish with lime slice. Enjoy!

candidates.name: Cherry Rum
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Citrus Coke
candidates.instructions: Pour half of coke in a glass. Then add Bacardi and top it off with the remaining coke. Stir and drink up!

candidates.name: Casa Blanca
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: City Slicker
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Casino Royale
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a sour glass.

candidates.name: Corpse Reviver
candidates.instructions: Shake, strain, straight up, cocktail glass rinsed with absinthe

candidates.name: Clove Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Coffee Liqueur
candidates.instructions: Combine coffee, sugar and water. Simmer 1 hour and let cool. Add vanilla and vodka. Age in sealed jar 2 to 3 weeks.

candidates.name: Dragonfly
candidates.instructions: In a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes, combine the gin and ginger ale. Stir well. Garnish with the lime wedge.

candidates.name: Dry Rob Roy
candidates.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine the Scotch and vermouth. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with the lemon twist.

candidates.name: Darkwood Sling
candidates.instructions: There are many good cherry liqueurs you can use, but I prefere Heering. Add one share of the liqueur. Then you add one share of Soda. For a sour sling use Tonic (most people prefer the drink without Tonic). Afterwards you fill the glass with Orange Juice and ice cubes.

candidates.name: Dark and Stormy
candidates.instructions: In a highball glass filled with ice add 6cl dark rum and top with ginger beer. Garnish with lime wedge.

candidates.name: Dark Caipirinha
candidates.instructions:
Muddle the sugar into the lime wedges in an old-fashioned glass.
Fill the glass with ice cubes.
Pour the cachaca into the glass.
Stir well.

candidates.name: Dubonnet Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Stir all ingredients (except lemon peel) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Add the twist of lemon peel and serve.

candidates.name: English Highball
candidates.instructions: Pour brandy, gin, and sweet vermouth into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water. Add the twist of lemon peel, stir, and serve. (Ginger ale may be substituted for carbonated water, if preferred.)

candidates.name: English Rose Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Rub rim of cocktail glass with lemon juice and dip rim of glass in powdered sugar. Shake all ingredients (except cherry) with ice and strain into sugar-rimmed glass. Top with the cherry and serve.

candidates.name: Elderflower Caipirinha
candidates.instructions: Take the glass and muddle the lime in it. Fill the glass with crushed ice and add the Cachaca. Stir well and top with some more crushed ice. Garnish with lime and enjoy!

candidates.name: Egg-Nog - Classic Cooked
candidates.instructions: In large saucepan, beat together eggs, sugar and salt, if desired. Stir in 2 cups of the milk. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture is thick enough to coat a metal spoon and reaches 160 degrees F. Remove from heat. Stir in remaining 2 cups milk and vanilla. Cover and regfigerate until thoroughly chilled, several hours or overnight. Just before serving, pour into bowl or pitcher. Garnish or add stir-ins, if desired. Choose 1 or several of: Chocolate curls, cinnamon sticks, extracts of flavorings, flavored brandy or liqueur, fruit juice or nectar, ground nutmeg, maraschino cherries, orange slices, peppermint sticks or candy canes, plain brandy, run or whiskey, sherbet or ice-cream, whipping cream, whipped. Serve immediately.

candidates.name: Empellón Cocina's Fat-Washed Mezcal
candidates.instructions:
To ensure that your pork fat is just as delicious as theirs, here’s their adobo marinade and what to do with it (you’ll also need a rack of ribs):

4 ancho chiles, 8 guajillo chiles and 4 chipotle chiles, plus 4 cloves roasted garlic, half a cup of cider vinegar, a quarter teaspoon of Mexican oregano, 1 teaspoon of ground black pepper, a whole clove, a quarter teaspoon of ground cinnamon and a half teaspoon of ground cumin.

Toast the dried chiles and soak in water for at least an hour until they are rehydrated. Drain and discard the soaking liquid. Combine the soaked chiles with the remaining ingredients and purée until smooth.

Cold smoke a rack of baby back pork ribs by taking a large hotel pan with woodchips on one side and charcoal on the other. Place another, smaller, pan with pork ribs, above the charcoal/woodchip pan. Ignite the charcoal, being careful to not ignite the woodchips. Cover both pans with foil and allow to smoke for 10-15 minutes, until desired level of smoke is achieved, then coat with adobo marinade and wrap in tin foil prior to placing ribs in a 300 degree oven for 7 hours. When the ribs have cooled, strain off the fat and use for the infusion.

If you’re having a hard time coming up to the same kind of volume of fat, make up the balance with pork lard from a butcher. To get the same depth of flavor without the ribs, heat up the fat in a pot with a few spoons of the marinade.

Once you’ve got your tub of seasoned pork fat in cooled liquid form, pour equal amounts of Ilegal Joven mezcal and fat into a sealable container. Seal the container and give it a really good shake, then put it in the freezer overnight. When the whole thing is separated and congealed, pour it through a fine mesh chinoise. If you don’t have a chinoise, try a fine mesh strainer, or if you don’t have one of those, try spooning off most of the fat. There will be some beads of orange fat left in the strained mezcal: run that through a few layers of cheesecloth (or coffee filters in a pinch) to get rid of the last of it.

The mezcal is now ready for drinking, straight-up or in a cocktail. 

Habanero tincture

Slice habaneros and add 2 ounces Ilegal Joven mezcal.
Allow to sit overnight or until desired level of heat is achieved.
Cocktail

Combine mezcal and chocolate liqueur in a mixing glass with ice and stir for 45 seconds.
Strain into chilled coupe.
Carefully "sink" the coffee liqueur down the inside of the coupe over a spoon.
Garnish with 5 drops habanero tincture.

candidates.name: Funk and Soul
candidates.instructions: Mix all ingredients together and strain into a Collins glass. Use Jamaican rum where possible for a more authentic taste.

candidates.name: French Negroni
candidates.instructions:
Add ice to a shaker and pour in all ingredients.
Using a bar spoon, stir 40 to 45 revolutions or until thoroughly chilled.
Strain into a martini glass or over ice into a rocks glass. Garnish with orange twist.

candidates.name: Frozen Daiquiri
candidates.instructions: Combine all ingredients (except for the cherry) in an electric blender and blend at a low speed for five seconds, then blend at a high speed until firm. Pour contents into a champagne flute, top with the cherry, and serve.

candidates.name: Flying Scotchman
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Flaming Lamborghini
candidates.instructions: Pour the Sambuca and Kahlua into the Cocktail Glass and give the drinker a straw. Pour the Baileys and Blue Curacao into two sepsrate shot glasses either side of the cocktail glass. Set light the concotion in the cocktail glass and start to drink through the straw (this drink should be drunk in one) , as the bottom of the glass is reached put out the fire by pouring the Baileys and Blue Curacao into the cocktail glass and keep drinking till it's all gone!!

candidates.name: Frozen Mint Daiquiri
candidates.instructions: Combine all ingredients with 1 cup of crushed ice in an electric blender. Blend at a low speed for a short length of time. Pour into an old-fashioned glass and serve.

candidates.name: Frozen Pineapple Daiquiri
candidates.instructions: Combine all ingredients with 1 cup of crushed ice in an electric blender. Blend at a low speed for a short length of time. Pour into a cocktail glass and serve.

candidates.name: GG
candidates.instructions: Pour the Galliano liqueur over ice. Fill the remainder of the glass with ginger ale and thats all there is to it. You now have a your very own GG.

candidates.name: Godfather
candidates.instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.

candidates.name: Gluehwein
candidates.instructions: Boil sugar and spices in water, leave in the water for 30 minutes. Strain the spiced water and mix with the wine. Heat slowly until short of boiling temperature. (To remove alcohol, let it boil for a while.) You may add lemon or orange juice to taste. Serve in irish coffee cup.

candidates.name: Gin Tonic
candidates.instructions: Fill a highball glass with ice, pour the gin, top with tonic water and squeeze a lemon wedge and garnish with a lemon wedge.

candidates.name: Gin Toddy
candidates.instructions: Mix powdered sugar and water in an old-fashioned glass. Add gin and one ice cube. Stir, add the twist of lemon peel, and serve.

candidates.name: Gin Smash
candidates.instructions: Muddle sugar with carbonated water and mint sprigs in an old-fashioned glass. Add gin and 1 ice cube. Stir, add the orange slice and the cherry, and serve.

candidates.name: Gin Lemon
candidates.instructions: For the preparation of the gin lemon you will not need the shaker. Fill the tumbler with ice, pour the gin and lemonade over it. Gently mix and decorate with a slice of lemon. Those who prefer can also add a few mint leaves. Your gin lemon is ready to be served.

candidates.name: Greyhound
candidates.instructions:
Add the vodka to a Collins glass filled with ice.
Top with grapefruit juice and stir.

candidates.name: Gin Squirt
candidates.instructions: Stir gin, grenadine, and powdered sugar with ice and strain into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water and stir. Decorate with the pineapple chunks and the strawberries and serve.

candidates.name: Grand Blue
candidates.instructions: Serve in an old fashioned glass.

candidates.name: Gin Cooler
candidates.instructions: Stir powdered sugar and 2 oz. carbonated water in a collins glass. Fill glass with ice and add gin. Fill with carbonated water and stir. Add the lemon peel and the orange spiral so that the end of the orange spiral dangles over rim of glass.

candidates.name: Gin Swizzle
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the lime juice, sugar, gin, and bitters. Shake well. Almost fill a colling glass with ice cubes. Stir until the glass is frosted. Strain the mixture in the shaker into the glass and add the club soda.

candidates.name: Grass Skirt
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, triple sec, pineapple juice, and grenadine. Shake well. Pour into an old-fashioned glass and garnish with the pineapple slice.

candidates.name: Grim Reaper
candidates.instructions: Mix Kahlua and 151 in glass. Quickly add ice and pour grenadine over ice to give ice red tint.

candidates.name: Gin and Soda
candidates.instructions:
Pour the Gin and Soda water into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Garnish with the lime wedge.

candidates.name: Hot Toddy
candidates.instructions:
STEP 1
Whisk the whisky and honey together and split between 2 heatproof glasses. Add half of the cinnamon stick to each, then top up with 200ml boiling water.

STEP 2
Add a splash of lemon juice to each, then taste and add more to your preference. Finish each with a slice of lemon, studded with a clove, and serve immediately.

candidates.name: Horse's Neck
candidates.instructions: Pour brandy and ginger ale directly into highball glass with ice cubes. Stir gently. Garnish with lemon zest. If desired, add dashes of Angostura Bitter.

candidates.name: Happy Skipper
candidates.instructions: Pour Captain Morgan's Spiced Rum over ice, fill glass to top with Ginger Ale. Garnish with lime. Tastes like a cream soda. Named for the Gilligan's Island reference ("The Captain" *in* "Ginger" is a Happy Skipper!)

candidates.name: Hunter's Moon
candidates.instructions: Put the Bombay Sapphire, Martini Bianco, sugar syrup & blackberries in a cocktail shaker with lots of ice and shake vigorously before pouring into a balloon glass, topping up with lemonade and garnishing with a wedge of orange.

candidates.name: Havana Cocktail
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Hemingway Special
candidates.instructions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake.

candidates.name: Highland Fling Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Stir all ingredients (except olive) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Add the olive and serve.

candidates.name: Irish Spring
candidates.instructions: Pour all ingredients (except orange slice and cherry) into a collins glass over ice cubes. Garnish with the slice of orange, add the cherry on top, and serve.

candidates.name: Imperial Fizz
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a highball glass over two ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

candidates.name: Imperial Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Shake with ice and strain into cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Irish Curdling Cow
candidates.instructions: Pour Irish Cream, Vodka, and Bourbon in a glass. Add some ice and mix in the orange juice.

candidates.name: Jitterbug
candidates.instructions: Wet glass, dip rim in sugar. Then add Ice. Then add everything else. It's that simple!

candidates.name: Jackhammer
candidates.instructions: Serve over ice- Warning,Deadly!

candidates.name: Jamaica Kiss
candidates.instructions: Fill a tumbler with ice cubes. Add a shot of Tia Maria and a shot of Jamaican light rum. Fill the tumbler with milk. Blend until smooth and serve immediately.

candidates.name: Japanese Fizz
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a highball glass over two ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

candidates.name: Jewel Of The Nile
candidates.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Jack Rose Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Jack's Vanilla Coke
candidates.instructions: After pouring in your ingredients, and adding 3-5 ice cubes, according to taste. Stir the drink with a stirrer to get the Vanilla off the bottom.

candidates.name: Kir
candidates.instructions: Add the crème de cassis to the bottom of the glass, then top up with wine.

candidates.name: Karsk
candidates.instructions: Put a copper coin in a coffe-cup and fill up with coffee until you no longer see the coin, then add alcohol until you see the coin. Norwegian speciality.

candidates.name: Kir Royale
candidates.instructions: Pour Creme de cassis in glass, gently pour champagne on top

candidates.name: Kiwi Lemon
candidates.instructions: Mix in highball glass. Stirr. Garnish with slice of kiwi.

candidates.name: Kentucky B And B
candidates.instructions: Pour the bourbon and Benedictine into a brandy snifter.

candidates.name: Long vodka
candidates.instructions: Shake a tall glass with ice cubes and Angostura, coating the inside of the glass. Por the vodka onto this, add 1 slice of lime and squeeze juice out of remainder, mix with tonic, stir and voila you have a Long Vodka

candidates.name: Loch Lomond
candidates.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine the Scotch, Drambuie, and vermouth. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with the lemon twist.

candidates.name: London Town
candidates.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Lady Love Fizz
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass over two ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

candidates.name: Long Island Tea
candidates.instructions: Combine all ingredients (except cola) and pour over ice in a highball glass. Add the splash of cola for color. Decorate with a slice of lemon and serve.

candidates.name: Lone Tree Cooler
candidates.instructions: Stir powdered sugar and 2 oz. carbonated water in a collins glass. Fill glass with ice, add gin and vermouth, and stir. Fill with carbonated water and stir again. Add the twist of lemon peel and the orange spiral so that the end dangles over rim of glass.

candidates.name: Lone Tree Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Stir ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Lazy Coconut Paloma
candidates.instructions: Mix the coconut liqueur (preferably tequila) with the grapefruit juice and top with soda water. Garnish with a large grapefruit slice against the inside of the glass.

candidates.name: Long Island Iced Tea
candidates.instructions: Mix all contents in a highball glass and sitr gently. Add dash of Coca-Cola for the coloring and garnish with lemon or lime twist.

candidates.name: Lemon Elderflower Spritzer
candidates.instructions: Pour all ingredients over ice, stir and enjoy!

candidates.name: Mimosa
candidates.instructions: Ensure both ingredients are well chilled, then mix into the glass. Serve cold.

candidates.name: Martini
candidates.instructions: Straight: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain in chilled martini cocktail glass. Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with olive.

candidates.name: Mauresque
candidates.instructions:
1 - Pour the Ricard (or pastis)
2 - Pour the orgeat syrup
3 - Finally pour the water and add ice cubes at your convenience.

Add the ice cubes at the end, otherwise the syrup and pastis do not mix well.

candidates.name: Mudslinger
candidates.instructions: Add all contents to a large jug or punch bowl. Stir well!

candidates.name: Martinez 2
candidates.instructions:
Add all ingredients to a mixing glass and fill with ice.

Stir until chilled, and strain into a chilled coupe glass.

candidates.name: Mulled Wine
candidates.instructions: Simmer 3 cups water with, sugar, cloves, cinnamon sticks, and lemon peel in a stainless steel pot for 10 minutes. Add wine heat to a "coffee temperature" (DO NOT BOIL) then add the brandy.

candidates.name: Munich Mule
candidates.instructions:
Fill glass with ice
Pour Gin and Lime Juice
Fill glass with Ginger Beer
Garnish with Cucumer and Lime slice

candidates.name: Mojito Extra
candidates.instructions: Put mint with lemon juice in a glas, mash the mint with a spoon, ice, rum & fill up with club soda. Top it with Angostura.

candidates.name: Midnight Mint
candidates.instructions: If available, rim cocktail (Martini) glass with sugar syrup then dip into chocolate flakes or powder. Add ingredients into shaker with ice. Shake well then strain into cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Mary Pickford
candidates.instructions: Shake and strain into a chilled large cocktail glass

candidates.name: Monkey Wrench
candidates.instructions: Pour all of the ingredients into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.

candidates.name: Nutty Irishman
candidates.instructions: Serve over ice

candidates.name: National Aquarium
candidates.instructions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker of ice. Shake well. Serve on the rocks.

candidates.name: New York Lemonade
candidates.instructions: Serve in a chilled cocktail glass. Lemon and sugar the rim. Stir and Strain.

candidates.name: Orgasm
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Orange Oasis
candidates.instructions: Shake brandy, gin, and orange juice with ice and strain into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with ginger ale, stir, and serve.

candidates.name: Orange Push-up
candidates.instructions: Combine liquors in a blender. Add a half scoop of ice and blend. Garnish with an orange and cherry flag. So good it will melt in your mouth!!!

candidates.name: Owen's Grandmother's Revenge
candidates.instructions: Add ingredients and mix in blender.

candidates.name: Pegu Club
candidates.instructions: Shake, strain, up, cocktail glass

candidates.name: Pink Lady
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Pink Moon
candidates.instructions: Slowly shake in a shaker with ice, strain into a square whiskey glass. Top with fresh ice. Add the blackberries to garnish. Add flowers and a green leaf for a special look!

candidates.name: Porto flip
candidates.instructions: Shake ingredients together in a mixer with ice. Strain into glass, garnish and serve.

candidates.name: Pina Colada
candidates.instructions: Mix with crushed ice in blender until smooth. Pour into chilled glass, garnish and serve.

candidates.name: Pink Penocha
candidates.instructions: mix all ingredients into bowl keep iced stir frequently

candidates.name: Pure Passion
candidates.instructions: Mix up all ingredients with a cocktail stirrer and serve with crushed ice with mint and edible flour if available.

candidates.name: Popped cherry
candidates.instructions: Served over ice in a tall glass with a popped cherry (can add more popped cherries if in the mood)!

candidates.name: Poppy Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Shake ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Port Wine Flip
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

candidates.name: Pornstar Martini
candidates.instructions: Straight: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain in chilled martini cocktail glass. Cut passion fruit in half and use as garnish. Pour prosecco into a chilled shot glass and serve alongside the martini.

candidates.name: Planter’s Punch
candidates.instructions: Squeeze an orange and strain the juice. Put all the ingredients in a shaker filled with ice and shake for at least 12 seconds. Strain into a highball glass and decorate with a pineapple wedge or fruit of your choice.

candidates.name: Port And Starboard
candidates.instructions: Pour carefully into a pousse-cafe glass, so that creme de menthe floats on grenadine. Serve without mixing.

candidates.name: Port Wine Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Stir ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Passion Fruit Martini
candidates.instructions: Pour all ingredients into a glass and stir. Garnish with half a passion fruit piece.

candidates.name: Quentin
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the rum, Kahlua, and cream. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass and garnish with the nutmeg.

candidates.name: Queen Bee
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Quick-sand
candidates.instructions: Simply add the orange juice, quite a quick pour in order to mix the sambucca with the orange juice. The juice MUST have fruit pulp!

candidates.name: Queen Charlotte
candidates.instructions: Pour red wine and grenadine into a collins glass over ice cubes. Fill with lemon-lime soda, stir, and serve.

candidates.name: Queen Elizabeth
candidates.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Quaker's Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Quarter Deck Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Rose
candidates.instructions: Shake together in a cocktail shaker, then strain into chilled glass. Garnish and serve.

candidates.name: Radler
candidates.instructions: Pour beer into large mug, slowly add the 7-up (or Sprite).

candidates.name: Rum Toddy
candidates.instructions: Dissolve powdered sugar in water in an old-fashioned glass. Add rum and one ice cube and stir. Add the twist of lemon peel and serve.

candidates.name: Royal Fizz
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except cola) with ice and strain into a chilled collins glass. Fill with cola and serve.

candidates.name: Rum Cooler
candidates.instructions: Pour the rum and soda into a collins glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well and garnish with the lemon wedge.

candidates.name: Rum Runner
candidates.instructions: Mix all ingredients in glass & add ice.

candidates.name: Rusty Nail
candidates.instructions: Pour the Scotch and Drambuie into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well. Garnish with the lemon twist.

candidates.name: Rum Cobbler
candidates.instructions: In an old-fashioned glass, dissolve the sugar in the club soda. Add crushed ice until the glass is almost full. Add the rum. Stir well. Garnish with the cherry and the orange and lemon slices.

candidates.name: Ruby Tuesday
candidates.instructions: Pour gin and cranberry into a highball filled with ice cubes. Add grenadine and stir.

candidates.name: Rosemary Blue
candidates.instructions:
1) Add the Bombay Sapphire, Blue Curacao, rosemary sprig and gently squeezed lemon wedge to a balloon glass. Swirl well to combine.
2) Fill with cubed ice and top with the Fever-Tree Light Tonic Water.
3) Gently fold with a bar spoon to mix.

candidates.name: Ramos Gin Fizz
candidates.instructions:
Prepare all the ingredients on the counter to be able to work well and quickly, especially the cream and egg white.

Pour all the ingredients into a shaker.

Shake vigorously for 1 minute: cream and egg white must be mixed perfectly, so don't rush.

Now open the shaker and put some ice and shake for 1-2 minutes. It depends on how long you can resist!

Pour into a highball glass, add a splash of soda and garnish to taste.

Ramos Gin Fizz was once drunk as an invigorating drink or even as a breakfast, try it as an aperitif and after dinner and you will discover a little gem now lost.

candidates.name: Royal Gin Fizz
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a highball glass over two ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

candidates.name: Rum Milk Punch
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice and strain into a collins glass. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

candidates.name: Raspberry Julep
candidates.instructions: Softly muddle the mint leaves and raspberry syrup in the bottom of the cup. Add crushed ice and Bourbon to the cup and then stir. Top with more ice, garnish with a mint sprig.

candidates.name: Rum Screwdriver
candidates.instructions: Pour rum into a highball glass over ice cubes. Add orange juice, stir, and serve.

candidates.name: Raspberry Cooler
candidates.instructions: Pour the raspberry vodka and soda into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.

candidates.name: Rum Old-fashioned
candidates.instructions: Stir powdered sugar, water, and bitters in an old-fashioned glass. When sugar has dissolved add ice cubes and light rum. Add the twist of lime peel, float 151 proof rum on top, and serve.

candidates.name: Russian Spring Punch
candidates.instructions: Pour the ingredients into an highball glass, top with Sparkling wine.

candidates.name: Radioactive Long Island Iced Tea
candidates.instructions: Pour all ingredients over ice in a very tall glass. Sip cautiously.

candidates.name: Smut
candidates.instructions: Throw it all together and serve real cold.

candidates.name: Spritz
candidates.instructions: Build into glass over ice, garnish and serve.

candidates.name: Scooter
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients well with cracked ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Sangria
candidates.instructions: Mix all together in a pitcher and refrigerate. Add cloves and cinnamon sticks to taste. Serve in wine glasses.

candidates.name: Snowball
candidates.instructions: Place one ice cube in the glass and add 1 1/2 oz of Advocaat. Fill up the glass with lemonade and decorate with a slice of lemon. Serve at once.

candidates.name: Sweet Tooth
candidates.instructions: Put 2 shots Godiva Liquour into a glass, add as much or as little milk as you would like.

candidates.name: Screwdriver
candidates.instructions: Mix in a highball glass with ice. Garnish and serve.

candidates.name: Sherry Flip
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

candidates.name: Sol Y Sombra
candidates.instructions: Shake ingredients with ice, strain into a brandy snifter, and serve. (The English translation of the name of this drink is "Sun and Shade", and after sampling this drink, you'll understand why. Thanks, Kirby.)

candidates.name: Shark Attack
candidates.instructions: Mix lemonade and water according to instructions on back of can. If the instructions say to add 4 1/3 cans of water do so. Mix into pitcher. Add 1 1/2 cup of Vodka (Absolut). Mix well. Pour into glass of crushed ice. Excellent!

candidates.name: Sherry Eggnog
candidates.instructions: Shake sherry, powdered sugar, and egg with ice and strain into a collins glass. Fill with milk and stir. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

candidates.name: Thriller
candidates.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: The Galah
candidates.instructions: Mix together the alcoholic portions and top with Pineapple and Lime juice.

candidates.name: Tia-Maria
candidates.instructions: Boil water, sugar and coffe for 10 mins and let cool. Add rum and vanilla. Put in clean bottle(s) and leave for 1 week before using.

candidates.name: Tipperary
candidates.instructions: Stir over ice. Strain into chilled glass. Cut a wide swath of orange peel, and express the orange oils over the drink. Discard orange twist.

candidates.name: Texas Sling
candidates.instructions: Blend with Ice until smooth. Serve in a tulip glass, top with whip cream.

candidates.name: The Last Word
candidates.instructions: Shake with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.

candidates.name: Turf Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Stir all ingredients (except orange peel) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Add the twist of orange peel and serve.

candidates.name: The Laverstoke
candidates.instructions:
1) Squeeze two lime wedges into a balloon glass then add the cordial, Bombay Sapphire and MARTINI Rosso Vermouth, swirl to mix.

2) Fully fill the glass with cubed ice and stir to chill.

3) Top with Fever-Tree Ginger Ale and gently stir again to combine.

4) Garnish with a snapped ginger slice and an awoken mint sprig.

candidates.name: The Philosopher
candidates.instructions: Add all the spirits in a shaker (best to use Hendricks gin) as well as the orange bitters and lemon juice. Strain into a Margarita glass, top with Prosecco.

candidates.name: Tuxedo Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with a cherry and a twist of lemon zest.

candidates.name: The Jimmy Conway
candidates.instructions:
Fill glass with ice
Pour in The Irishman and Disaronno
Fill to the top with Cranberry Juice
Garnish with a slice of lemon…Enjoy!

candidates.name: Victor
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Vampiro
candidates.instructions: Vampiros may be made in a tall glass or an old fashioned glass. Bartenders may first "rim" the glass with Kosher Salt, which is done by placing a layer of Kosher Salt on a chopping board, moistening the glass' rim with lime juice or water, and then placing the upside down glass rim onto the Kosher Salt, so that the salt sticks to the moistened rim. The second step is to fill half the glass with ice and add one or two shooter glasses full of high quality Tequila. The next stage is to add the flavouring elements. This is done by squeezing a fresh lime into the glass, adding a few grains of salt, adding citrus-flavoured soda pop, until the glass is 4/5 full, and then adding spicy Viuda de Sanchez (or orange juice, lime juice and pico de gallo). The final step is to stir the ingredients so that the flavours are properly blended.

candidates.name: Vesuvio
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes, and serve.

candidates.name: Veteran
candidates.instructions: Pour the rum and cherry brandy into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.

candidates.name: Van Vleet
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes, and serve.

candidates.name: Vodka Lemon
candidates.instructions: The vodka lemon is prepared directly in a highball glass or in a large tumbler: put 6-7 ice cubes in the glass, pour the vodka, lemonade and mix with a bar spoon. Finally decorate with a slice of lemon and, if you prefer, add a few mint leaves. Your vodka lemon is ready to be served.

candidates.name: Vodka Slime
candidates.instructions: Fill glass with ice. Add vodka, 7-up then finish with the lime juice.

candidates.name: Vodka Tonic
candidates.instructions:
Wash and cut 1 wedge and 1 slice of lime or lemon.
Fill a tumbler with fresh ice.
Pour the desired dose of vodka and top up with the tonic.
Squeeze the lime wedge into the glass and decorate with the slice.
That's all, very simple: it's just the recipe for happiness!

candidates.name: Vodka Martini
candidates.instructions: Shake the vodka and vermouth together with a number of ice cubes, strain into a cocktail glass, add the olive and serve.

candidates.name: Vodka Russian
candidates.instructions: Mix it as a ordinary drink .

candidates.name: Vermouth Cassis
candidates.instructions: Stir vermouth and creme de cassis in a highball glass with ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir again, and serve.

candidates.name: Vodka And Tonic
candidates.instructions: Pour vodka into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with tonic water, stir, and serve.

candidates.name: Valencia Cocktail
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Whisky Mac
candidates.instructions: Pour both of the ingredients into a wine goblet with no ice.

candidates.name: Wine Punch
candidates.instructions: Combine all of the ingredients and pour over a block of ice.

candidates.name: Wine Cooler
candidates.instructions: Mix wine and soft drink. Pour into glass. Add ice.

candidates.name: Winter Paloma
candidates.instructions: Everyone’s favourite Paloma gets a delicious Indian makeover. Tequila reposado infused with “Timur Pepper” which has citrusy & grapefruit notes and is grown at the foothills of Himalaya. It also produces a slightly numbing and tingling sensation on your lip when consumed. We have also spiced up the fresh grapefruit juice with the warming spice blend from Himalaya. The combination of all these interesting elements has allowed us to elevate your Paloma sipping experience.

candidates.name: White Wine Sangria
candidates.instructions: Chop the Lemon, Lime and other fruits into large chunks. Fill the Pitcher with the white wine and mix in the Apple Brandy. Top to taste with soda water.

candidates.name: Whitecap Margarita
candidates.instructions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. This makes one drink.

candidates.name: Waikiki Beachcomber
candidates.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

candidates.name: Yellow Bird
candidates.instructions: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass

candidates.name: Zambeer
candidates.instructions: Mix sambuca with rootbeer and stir. Add ice

candidates.name: Zenmeister
candidates.instructions: Mix together and enjoy

candidates.name: Zima Blaster
candidates.instructions: Fill glass with ice. Pour in Chambord, then fill with Zima. Mix and enjoy.

candidates.name: Zimadori Zinger
candidates.instructions: Pour Zima in a collins glass over ice and then pour the shot of Midori. Don't stir. Garnish with a cherry.

candidates.name: Ziemes Martini Apfelsaft
candidates.instructions: Serve without ice. At least the juice shold have room temperature.

candidates.name: 155 Belmont
candidates.instructions: Blend with ice. Serve in a wine glass. Garnish with carrot.

candidates.name: 410 Gone
candidates.instructions: Mix together and enjoy!
fill glass with crushed ice. Add vodka. Add a splash of grand-marnier. Fill with o.j.

candidates.name: 501 Blue
candidates.instructions: Mix equal amounts into a glass with ice.

candidates.name: 57 Chevy with a White License Plate
candidates.instructions: 1. Fill a rocks glass with ice 2.add white creme de cacao and vodka 3.stir

candidates.name: 69 Special
candidates.instructions: Pour 2 oz. gin. Add 4 oz. 7-up. Add Lemon Juice for flavor. If you are weak, top up glass with more 7-Up.

candidates.name: 747 Drink
candidates.instructions:
Fill a Collins glass with ice.
Pour in vodka, lime cordial, and cranberry juice.
Fill up with Sprite.
Garnish with a Lime wheel or some cranberries

candidates.name: 9 1/2 Weeks
candidates.instructions: Combine all ingredients in glass mixer. Chill and strain into Cocktail glass. Garnish with sliced strawberry.
